<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("=== Before SPACE ===")
for node in before_seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")

print("\n=== After SPACE ===")
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Check player position
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"\nPlayer: boundary={node['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
